items.prompt: Did the librarian explain the new return system to you?
items.answer: She wanted to know if my student card had expired.

items.prompt: What did your roommate Amara say about the heater?
items.answer: Amara wondered when the maintenance team would replace the radiator.

items.prompt: Where did you leave the lab notebook after class?
items.answer: I tucked the notebook behind the printer in the corner office.

items.prompt: What did your professor mention about your draft?
items.answer: Professor Petra has not finished reviewing the second chapter of my thesis yet.

items.prompt: Tell me what happened to that missing tablet.
items.answer: Galen could not remember whether he had returned the tablet.

items.prompt: Have you spoken with the financial aid office this week?
items.answer: Honestly, I have not received any updates about my application.

items.prompt: Why did you skip the afternoon seminar on Wednesday?
items.answer: I could not concentrate after working through the entire night before our chemistry presentation.

items.prompt: Tell me how the new study room compares to the old one.
items.answer: This study room feels much quieter than the central library does.

items.prompt: What did Edith mention about those boxes in the hallway?
items.answer: The boxes were moved into the closet near the elevator.

items.prompt: What did your advisor say about the thesis topic?
items.answer: She asked whether the proposed methodology would meet department standards.

items.prompt: What did Amara say about the portrait at the gallery tonight?
items.answer: The portrait Amara found turned out to be quite rare among collectors.

items.prompt: When does the new shuttle schedule take effect for residents?
items.answer: The driver explained when the morning routes would begin operating.

items.prompt: What did your tutor want to confirm with you yesterday?
items.answer: My tutor asked if the practice exam had been graded.

items.prompt: Have you heard back from the housing committee about your appeal?
items.answer: The committee has not finalized the room assignments for sophomores.

items.prompt: Tell me what happened with Mateo at the orientation breakfast.
items.answer: Mateo overslept because his alarm failed to ring on time.

items.prompt: Did you cancel your gym membership last month?
items.answer: I no longer attend the morning yoga classes near downtown.

items.prompt: Where did you store the chemistry samples after the experiment?
items.answer: The samples are sealed inside a labeled box on the shelf.

items.prompt: What did the recruiter ask you during the interview today?
items.answer: She wanted feedback about my recent internship at the museum.

items.prompt: Why did Roxana skip the rehearsal you organized last week?
items.answer: Roxana explained why she could not attend our final dress rehearsal last weekend.

items.prompt: Tell me what Lior said about the workshop next Saturday.
items.answer: Lior wondered whether the new workshop included a registration fee.
